name: Takuji
message: "I see..."

name: Takuji
message: "I understand now."

name: Takuji
message: "I see... I understand now."

name: Tomosane
message: "Understand what?"

name: Takuji
message: "My preparation to become the savior is still not complete."

name: Tomosane
message: "You're still going on about that?"

name: Takuji
message: "That's the reason you're so strong."

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh? What the hell does that mean?"

name: Takuji
message: "You can come challenge me any time you like."

name: Takuji
message: "I'll make you bow to me every time."

name: Takuji
message: "Eventually, I'll make you bow down in spirit too."

name: Takuji
message: "I'll make you bow down before my glory."

name: Tomosane
message: "Y-You crazy bastard..."

name: Takuji
message: "Hehehehehe... Keep on barking. You can challenge me any time you like."

name: Takuji
message: "Your existence is nothing more than a challenge for me to overcome on my path."

name: Takuji
message: "My battle with you is just training."

name: Takuji
message: "That's the reason my mother gave you such exceptional power."

name: Tomosane
message: "Your mother? Just how crazy are you?"

name: Takuji
message: "Hehehehe... Well, go rest for today. You can't challenge me to a rematch with those wounds."

name: Takuji
message: "Hahahahahaha..."

name: Female Student
message: "I saw it earlier, but now everyone's talking about it."

name: Female Student
message: "They were linking to it on other sites."

name: Female Student
message: "Yeah, the posts were all about the Web Bot Project."

name: Male Student
message: "It's just like I said."

name: Female Student
message: "I wonder if it's real."

name: Male Student
message: "What?"

name: Female Student
message: "The Web Bot Project says the world will be destroyed on the 20th."

name: Male Student
message: "You saw the link, right? It said that's what the data actually means."

name: Female Student
message: "Yeah, but... that's scary..."
I instantly healed my wounds with the power of the savior.
In the classroom, there were even more people talking about the world's destruction.
July 20th, 2012.
Takashima Zakuro's prediction.
Shiroyama's death.
All the prophecies from all the corners of the world match up.
The words of those prophecies echoed throughout the world, as if the world's destruction were upon this very day.
But still... this is just the beginning.
The vulgar peasantry are far from comprehending what it truly means.
Far.
"    know..."

name: Male Student
message: "Huh?"

name: Male Student
message: "Oh, it's         ."

name: Yuki
message: "And you're             ."
That's...
That woman is...
That's...
That woman is...
That woman... She's...
Minakami Yuki...
A girl from the same class as me...
But still...
―What is she doing...
Is she looking for something?
It looks like she's asking about something.
She's talking to... Yokoyama Kiyoshi.
He's... Well, who cares about him.
Average looks. Average grades. Not anyone I care about.
But still.
That Minakami Yuki... For some reason, she grabs my attention.
Minakami Yuki.
They say she's so strong that even Yuuki avoids her... She's also a genius who placed near the top in the country on the trial examination, though I heard her grades have been awful lately.
Before, she was so different from me that I would never even approach her, but... now I've been reborn as the savior.
Now I'm surprisingly similar to her.
We're similar.
As elevated existences, we have much in common.
Yuki, at the apex of human achievement, is very close to me, since I still haven't completed my transformation into the savior.
Now I can understand that.
Minakami Yuki...
There's something else about her...
I can't shake that thought.

name: Kiyoshi
message: "It's awfully rare for you to talk to me."

name: Yuki
message: "I actually don't want to talk to you at all, but... I have something I need to ask you, so whatever."

name: Kiyoshi
message: "Something you want to ask me? Wow, I'm honored."

name: Yuki
message: "That Web Bot Project you were talking about. Is there really a site like that, where they predict the future?"

name: Kiyoshi
message: "Of course there is!"

name: Yuki
message: "That's one of those Web Bots that automatically goes around the Internet and collects information to store in a searchable database, right?"

name: Yuki
message: "Then it's simply a bot that generates HTTP requests, retrieves some HTML documents, searches for keywords within it, and saves them in the database. Then it can analyze the document's anchor tags and use the first file's links to retrieve additional HTML files."

name: Kiyoshi
message: "I don't get it..."

name: Yuki
message: "To put it simply, the Web Bot is a search engine with spiders and web crawlers."

name: Yuki
message: "What's this Web Bot Project that's supposedly making those predictions, though? What's the website?"

name: Kiyoshi
message: "Um, I don't really know myself. It's just a topic on the message board."

name: Yuki
message: "The underground message board..."

name: Kiyoshi
message: "You know about it, then?"

name: Yuki
message: "No, not really, but I've heard rumors. Actually, have you ever been to the site?"

name: Kiyoshi
message: "Yeah, of course I have."

name: Yuki
message: "Then could you give me the URL?"

name: Kiyoshi
message: "Sure, but you have to register to get past the front page, and you can't even register without a referral."

name: Yuki
message: "Registration? I thought it was anonymous?"

name: Kiyoshi
message: "Yeah, but what would be the point if it were open to the public?"

name: Yuki
message: "So that's how it works."

name: Kiyoshi
message: "Yeah."

name: Yuki
message: "Well that's fine. Anyway, send me the URL, and then give me a referral."

name: Kiyoshi
message: "What's your phone's email address? I can send it right now."

name: Yuki
message: "I don't have one."

name: Kiyoshi
message: "Huh? You don't have a cell phone?"

name: Yuki
message: "It ticks me off that you think everyone has one. Don't go around assuming everyone has a phone."

name: Kiyoshi
message: "R-Really? Umm... you don't, huh..."

name: Yuki
message: "What's your problem? I don't have one. It doesn't exist."

name: Kiyoshi
message: "But still,
everyone browses that site with their cell phones. I don't think I've ever seen anyone go there from a computer."

name: Yuki
message: "Just send it to my computer. I always get on the Internet from a desktop computer."

name: Kiyoshi
message: "Sure... Tell me your email address, then."

name: Yuki
message: "Here."
She wrote down her email address and passed it to him.

name: Kiyoshi
message: "This is a free mail account..."

name: Yuki
message: "That's right. Is there a problem with that?"

name: Kiyoshi
message: "No, but don't you have a real email address?

name: Yuki
message: "I do, but I'm not giving it to you."

name: Kiyoshi
message: "Um, I have a favor to ask."

name: Yuki
message: "What?"

name: Kiyoshi
message: "If I become your referrer, that means we're friends, right?"

name: Yuki
message: "You shouldn't say such nasty things with a grin on your face...
So then, what are you trying to say?"

name: Kiyoshi
message: "There's this party pretty soon... If you'd like to come, I could get you in."

name: Kiyoshi
message: "Oogh."

name: Yuki
message: "You remember what happened the last time you guys tried hitting on me, don't you?"

name: Yuki
message: "I hate men. If you start talking like that again, I'll do to you what I did to them, but otherwise I don't mind."

name: Kiyoshi
message: "Um, we actually might need you to do something like that. We need someone strong. There are gonna be some people around who don't like us all that much."

name: Yuki
message: "I don't really know what you mean, but I don't mind participating."

name: Kiyoshi
message: "Hell yeah!
They've been dissing us ever since Shiroyama went and died..."
She really is investigating the incident. Or rather, something hidden behind the incident.
She's investigating... my mother's great plan for this world.
I don't know what reason she has.
Anyway, that woman is trying to investigate the underground message board.
What is she investigating? And how is she planning to do it...
That's something worth paying attention to...
Maybe I should keep an eye on her...

name: Takuji
message: "Hmm?"
She stopped... It looks like she's talking to someone, but...
That's...
Those two creepy flickering shadows...
Only one thing comes to mind when I see shadows like that.
The Wakatsuki sisters...
Actually, Minakami Yuki is friends with the Wakatsuki sisters.
Apparently they're childhood friends, and they walk to school together sometimes.
The Wakatsuki sisters...
They're definitely not good people...
And... those two have read my mind a couple times before.
As the savior, I can't allow them to do that anymore.
Still, it's strange that they even have that power at all. Normal humans can't do anything like that.
Why are there so many people with special powers in this school...
Yuuki Tomosane, who has as much strength as me.
Minakami Yuki, who has as much knowledge as me.
The Wakatsuki sisters, who can read minds.
Takashima Zakuro, who predicted the world's destruction before her death.
And me, the person who will save the world from destruction.
This can't be a coincidence.
All of it must be part of a greater design.

name: Takuji
message: "Did my mother send... the Wakatsuki sisters too?"
No... That doesn't sound right...
Something different is responsible for them... Something evil...
I don't know why, but they're somehow unpleasant to be around.
It's not just their ability to read minds. I feel something evil within them...

name: Takuji
message: "They might be different."
I don't have any proof, but that's how it feels.
Even Yuuki, who bullied me for so long, isn't nearly as unpleasant as they are.
And of course, neither is Takashima-san.
It bothers me...
Why would something evil try to get close to Minakami Yuki, the girl who has so much knowledge...
The Wakatsuki sisters...
I have to find out what you two really are...
Hehehehe...
After that, Minakami Yuki made small talk with an underclassman.
That was Yokoyama Kiyoshi's little sister. I think her name was Yasuko... Well, she's not important.
After that, she went to Takashima Zakuro's empty classroom and investigated her seat.
She's a day late, but that's still a good idea.
Yesterday, I too investigated that desk.
She must be pretty interested in finding out the truth behind the incident.
But still...
She has a detective kit... That makes me feel a little nostalgic.
When I was little, my mother bought me a detective kit like that.
Occasionally my mother would be kind to me and buy me things like that.
But I was too young, so I didn't know what I was supposed to do with it.
She must have wanted me to grow into a smart child like Minakami Yuki.
All right... I know what she's capable of.
All she's doing is playing detective...
She looked promising, but I guess I expected too much of her.
I probably don't need to follow her anymore...
I guess I can just leave her alone now, but...
But...

name: Takuji
message: "It might be interesting to see her reaction..."
I've come into contact with Yuuki quite a few times, but I've hardly ever talked to her.
She's probably not a threat to me, but... she might be another part of my mother's program.
If she is, she might have some special power that even I can't overcome.
That's right... It wouldn't be a bad decision to talk to her directly.
Let's try it.
I waited for her by the old pool.
This is the entrance to my base.
She should notice me here if she really does have any special powers.
Yesterday, she was loitering around here.
Maybe she's already realized my base is here.
Though it's not the kind of thing someone could easily find.
After all, it was the savior who created this base.
A mere human like her couldn't find a base constructed by the son of God so easily...
I saw her come into view.
I spoke to her.

name: Takuji
message: "What's wrong, Minakami-san?"

name: Takuji
message: "Were you looking for me?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, I have something to ask you..."

name: Takuji
message: "You don't look so good."

name: Yuki
message: "D-Don't worry about me..."

name: Takuji
message: "I'm feeling great, though."
She's clearly suspicious of me.
I can read her expression and see into her mind.
Before, I wasn't able to read people's minds.
But now I can.
As the savior, it's no more difficult to read a person's mind than it is to look at the contents of a clear glass bottle.
Just by squinting a little, I can see everything they're thinking about.
I can hear the words in her heart.
Just as if she were speaking them...

name: Yuki
message: "What? He's changed so much... He's not usually like this..."

name: Yuki
message: "Why does he look so divine?"

name: Yuki
message: "It's like his personality completely changed..."

name: Yuki
message: "A change in personality?"

name: Yuki
message: "There's no way that could happen so quickly... So then what else could it be?"

name: Yuki
message: "Maybe drugs?"

name: Yuki
message: "Every time I meet him, I start to feel sick... and his personality has completely changed."
Hehehehe... She's slower than I thought.
I will compliment her on noticing my divinity, but I hate how she assumes it's caused by drugs.
She doesn't know what's really going on. She doesn't understand.
She looks suspicious.
She must be thinking that I use a vaporizer, since I don't smell like drugs.
Her conclusion is completely incorrect, though.
Poor thing... She's not that smart at all...

name: Takuji
message: "Smoking with a vaporizer, you say? Nope."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?!"
She's surprised... Hehehe, she's definitely shocked at having her mind read.
I should tease her some more...
I'll show her just how easy it is to read her mind...

name: Takuji
message: "Wouldn't that have to be something tasteless and odorless? That would be crazy expensive."

name: Yuki
message: "What are you talking about?"

name: Takuji
message: "What's wrong? You look shocked, as if someone just read your mind."

name: Takuji
message: "Didn't you have a question for me? That's why you came."

name: Yuki
message: "Wh-What are you so cheerful for? You're a creepy guy."
She really did come looking for me.
Well, since she came all the way out here to the old pool, that was obvious.
For what reason?
Hmm...
I see... I did my best to erase those letters, but vitally, my name was still there on the desk.
And so she realized that Takashima-san and I had a relationship... Your powers of reasoning are quite impressive, Minakami-san.
Perhaps I should apologize for insulting her intelligence earlier.

name: Takuji
message: "I see. My name was on Takashima-san's desk, huh? You did a good job finding that."

name: Yuki
message: "Wha―!"
Hehehehehehe! Her face is great!
I love seeing her shocked expression. It's too funny...

name: Yuki
message: "M-Mamiya, you! Oww..."
She put her hand on her head.
Now that I think of it, before she came here, I had a light headache that made it feel like my ears were full of white noise.
I see. So she really is connected to me in some way.

name: Takuji
message: "A headache again? Maybe you can't bear to look at someone who's grasped the truth?"

name: Yuki
message: "What? That's ridiculous."

name: Takuji
message: "Quite. I thought maybe you would understand. I can't write you off as a complete stranger."

name: Yuki
message: "That's gross. We are complete strangers. The only thing we have in common is our class."

name: Takuji
message: "Of course. That's the relation between you and I."

name: Takuji
message: "That's why you deserve no greeting from me."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"

name: Takuji
message: "Because I have to confirm whether or not the person in front of me is a superior human being."

name: Yuki
message: "What are you... Ouch..."

name: Takuji
message: "I'll say it again."

name: Takuji
message: "That's why you deserve no greeting from me!"
I presented her with a metaphysical riddle.
It must be too complicated for her to comprehend, like a Zen dialogue.
But...
I'm talking to her about the dream of life I saw last night... The dream of higher dimensions.

name: Takuji
message: "That's right. To put it in words, you're still confined to the second dimension."

name: Yuki
message: "The second dimension?"

name: Takuji
message: "Yes! That's right. Here, right now, is the two-dimensional world. Your existence is like that of an ant."

name: Yuki
message: "What are you talking about?"

name: Takuji
message: "How would a two-dimensional ant comprehend the third dimension?"

name: Yuki
message: "I don't know what you're saying at all! You're not making any sense."

name: Takuji
message: One way is for the ant to observe a three-dimensional object passing through the plane of the second dimension. It would observe the object as a square flickering in place."

name: Takuji
message: "The only part of the third dimension the ant's imagination can conjure is its shadow."

name: Takuji
message: "The only thing those living in two dimensions are permitted to watch is the shadow changing from moment to moment."

name: Takuji
message: "Then how would we three-dimensional humans comprehend the fourth dimension? How would we comprehend the fifth? The sixth? How would we comprehend the dimensions beyond that?"

name: Takuji
message: That's right. In the same way a two-dimensional being can only imagine us as square shadows, we must imagine the higher dimensions as shadows."
She was confused by the complicated explanation.
I watched her closely.
Her expression, the way her body moved, what she thought... all of it.
Her head must still hurt.
She frowned and brought her hand to her head again.
That's to be expected, since she's standing before a divine existence like myself and listening to my words of truth...
It's amazing that she hasn't fainted.
Oh? She's thinking of something different.
She's so confused that she's going to resort to the most vulgar and primitive form of communication.
The most vulgar and primitive form of communication... What we usually call 'violence.'
I'm so divine that she wants to use violence to subdue me.
I see. What a banal choice.
Just like the Roman Empire used violence when it crucified Jesus Christ, she wants to use violence to force me to submit.
She's no better than Yuuki... I'm disappointed.

name: Yuki
message: "Mamiya, come a bit closer..."

name: Takuji
message: "I'll be going now!"

name: Yuki
message: "Hey, I'm talking to you!"

name: Takuji
message: "I'm not too fond of getting punched."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?!"
She's convinced now.
She knows that I can see directly into her mind. Now she's truly shocked.

name: Takuji
message: "Can I really read your mind?"

name: Takuji
message: "Heheh. I'll let you chase that particular answer yourself."

name: Takuji
message: "But if you can't catch it, you'll never know."

name: Yuki
message: "Mamiya Takuji!"

name: Takuji
message: "Well then, I'll be taking my leave."

name: Takuji
message: "Again..."

name: Ayana
message: "Mamiya-kun."

name: Takuji
message: "Hello... Otonashi-san."

name: Ayana
message: "Have you found the truth?"
I'd forgotten about her.
She has a different aura than the rest.
Different than Yuuki or Minakami.
A little different from the Wakatsuki sisters...
Of course, completely different from Takashima-san.
When I see her... I'm assaulted by a different feeling that's not quite the same kind of unpleasantness.
What is it?
What is this feeling?
Am I afraid?
N-No way.
What am I thinking...
Calm down.
Just calm down.
Why would I fear her?
There's no reason for me to fear her!
I'm the savior... I'm not a normal human.
There's no reason for me to be afraid of her.
That's right.
I have gathered all the world's knowledge and wisdom.
Of all the beings on earth, I am the one closest to truth itself.

name: Takuji
message: "N-No, the road to truth is steep."

name: Ayana
message: "I see."

name: Ayana
message: "Is truth to be found in the school?"

name: Takuji
message: "It's not just in the school. It's everywhere."

name: Takuji
message: "A person who can see the truth will be able to see it within everything his gaze rests on."

name: Ayana
message: "I see."

name: Ayana
message: "Isn't that..."

name: Takuji
message: "Isn't it what?"

name: Ayana
message: "Isn't that scary?"
What's with her?
Her words were sharp like a blade, and cold...
But I...

name: Takuji
message: "Hehehehe... Scary? Why would I be? You say that as if I were cowering in the corner."
I'm the savior... I'm not scared of someone like this.
Calm down.

name: Ayana
message: "Am I wrong?"

name: Takuji
message: "Of course you are. There's nothing I'm afraid of. Rather, shouldn't you be the one afraid of me?"

name: Ayana
message: "...Afraid of you? Why do you think that?"

name: Takuji
message: "Because we're completely alone in this underground container. No one will come to rescue you, no matter what happens."

name: Ayana
message: "Rescue?"

name: Ayana
message: "Do you need someone to rescue you, Mamiya-kun?"

name: Takuji
message: "You really don't understand what I'm saying, do you? They would be coming to rescue you."

name: Ayana
message: "Hehehe, I see."

name: Ayana
message: "That's a relief."

name: Takuji
message: "What are you talking about?! What should I be afraid of?! There's nothing I'm afraid of!"

name: Takuji
message: "Y-You're the one who doesn't know anything!"

name: Takuji
message: "Right now, you and I are alone in a closed room, where no one will come! You're the one in danger!"

name: Ayana
message: "Hehehe... Maybe you should bite instead of just barking, then. Especially since we're all alone in a closed room."

name: Takuji
message: "What did you say?!"
She still thinks I'm as powerless as I was before.
She doesn't know I'm the strongest person in recorded history.
That's why she isn't afraid of me.
Then I should...

name: Ayana
message: "Do you want to try raping me?"

name: Takuji
message: "What?"

name: Ayana
message: "Or... would you rather murder me?"
I really should.
No... It's a meaningless challenge.
There's no need to do that.

name: Ayana
message: "It should be easy for the strongest person in recorded history, right?"

name: Takuji
message: "Wha―!"
Calm down.
Don't let her affect you.
Anyway, I shouldn't rise to her challenge.

name: Takuji
message: "Haa... Could you stop it with the pointless challenges?"

name: Ayana
message: "Really? I was having fun."

name: Takuji
message: "More importantly, would you answer one of my questions?"

name: Ayana
message: "What you're afraid of? Hehehe..."

name: Ayana
message: "I could tell you that."

name: Takuji
message: "Th-There's nothing to tell. I'm not afraid of anything. I know everything, and I see everything. I'm the person who will save the world."

name: Ayana
message: "Hmm... You're going to save the world?"

name: Ayana
message: "Save the world..."
This person... her eyes...
I felt like I was being sucked into a bottomless pit when I stared into them.
No, this feeling...
I'd never felt this sensation before.
Even Tomosane Yuuki... Even Minakami Yuki... didn't make me feel like this.
Just what is this feeling?

name: Takuji
message: "Otonashi... Ayana..."

name: Ayana
message: "Yes?"

name: Takuji
message: "Just what are you?"

name: Ayana
message: "Sweat."

name: Ayana
message: "You're sweating."

name: Takuji
message: "That's just because it's summer."
No, that's a lie.
That was definitely just a bluff.
I understand that.
I've started to fear her.
It's definitely cold sweat running down my cheek right now.
The problem is, why?
Why am I afraid of this woman?

name: Ayana
message: "What you're afraid of..."

name: Ayana
message: "Your mother?"

name: Ayana
message: "Death."

name: Ayana
message: "But that's nothing more than an excuse."

name: Ayana
message: "Mamiya-kun, do you want to see the truth?"

name: Takuji
message: "H-Huh? Wh-What... I don't care what a human like you thinks the truth is. I-I'm..."

name: Ayana
message: "The person who knows the truth."

name: Takuji
message: "Th-That's right!"

name: Ayana
message: "It must be blissful."

name: Takuji
message: "What?"

name: Ayana
message: "Hehehe... It's the best way to avoid looking at that which has been hidden."

name: Takuji
message: "Wh-What do you mean? What are you trying to say?!"

name: Ayana
message: "What do I mean? Hehehe... You're the one who knows that best."

name: Takuji
message: "Wh-What do you..."

name: Ayana
message: "You were the one who hid it, after all."

name: Takuji
message: "I hid it?"

name: Ayana
message: "Yes. You hid it from everyone."

name: Takuji
message: "Everyone?"
"Yes... From your      ... and         ."

name: Takuji
message: "Wh-What did you say?!"

name: Ayana
message: "Look... you hide it just like that."

name: Takuji
message: "Wh-What? I'm not hiding anything!"

name: Ayana
message: "Your mother...        always goes to visit your mother."

name: Takuji
message: "Ah!"

name: Takuji
message: "Y-You're the one hiding the words!"

name: Ayana
message: "Hehehe... You really are amusing. Too amusing, in fact. Humans are quite amusing."

name: Ayana
message: "Why do humans try to hide things?"

name: Ayana
message: "Even though they know something, they act as if they don't, and then one day they truly do forget."

name: Ayana
message: "They still want to know it, even after they've forgotten it."

name: Takuji
message: "What are you?"

name: Ayana
message: "People have hidden death... The world has hidden death."

name: Takuji
message: "Hidden death?"

name: Ayana
message: "Yes... People have banished death from the world."

name: Ayana
message: "And then they try to dig it up after they've gone through all the trouble of hiding it."

name: Ayana
message: "Why are people captivated by death once they've finally managed to hide it out of sight?"

name: Ayana
message: "They put so much effort into hiding it, and yet they dig it up again."

name: Ayana
message: "Mamiya-kun, you too are trying to unearth something which you've hidden."

name: Takuji
message: "Wh-What are you..."
A quiet voice...
Lucid eyes...
She seemed to know, seemed to see everything. She...
...gave me goosebumps.
But...

name: Ayana
message: "The next world."

name: Takuji
message: "The next world?"

name: Ayana
message: "You won't be the one to reach it."

name: Takuji
message: "Wh-What?"

name: Ayana
message: "This is the boundary. Not the         , but the boundary line."

name: Takuji
message: "Boundary line?"

name: Ayana
message: "So it's okay if you pretend like you don't know."

name: Ayana
message: "You can just act like you haven't noticed."

name: Ayana
message: "But then, why are you trying to uncover that which you've hidden?"

name: Ayana
message: "Why don't you just pretend like you don't know?"

name: Takuji
message: "You think I hid it? You think I'm just pretending like I don't know?"

name: Takuji
message: "What are you saying?! What have I hidden?!"

name: Ayana
message: "Look..."

name: Takuji
message: "Look?"

name: Ayana
message: "Look at the sky."

name: Takuji
message: "The sky? This is an underground reservoir tank―"

name: Takuji
message: "Wh-Why is the sky there?"

name: Takuji
message: "Th-This is the reservoir tank, and... and..."

name: Ayana
message: "That is the truth you were looking for."

name: Takuji
message: "What is that?"

name: Ayana
message: "End Sky."

name: Takuji
message: "Wh-What?"

name: Ayana
message: "Humans are amusing."

name: Ayana
message: "I can see humans when I stand on the boundary line. That's why I can't stop playing this game."

name: Takuji
message: "Y-You're... not a normal human?"

name: Ayana
message: "Hehehe... What do I look like to you?"

name: Takuji
message: "Y-You're..."

name: Ayana
message: "After all, I..."
"I'm the Mahou Shoujo Riruru."

name: Takuji
message:
"AAAAAAAAaaAaaaAAaaAaAaaAAAAAaAaAaaaAAAAAAAAAAaaaaaaAAAAAAaaAaaaa
aAAAaaaaAaaaaaAAAaaaaAaaaaaAAAaaaaaaaaaaaaaaAAAaaAAAAAaaaaaaaAaaAAAAAaaaaaaaaaaaaaAAAaaAAAAAAAaaAAaaaaaaAAAAAAaaaaaAAAAaAAAaaAaaAaaaAAAAAAAaaAAaAAAaaAaaAAAAAaaAAaAAAaaAaaAaaaAAAaAAAaaAaaAaaaAAAaAAAaaAaaAaaaAAAaAAAaaAaaAaaaAaAAAAAGGGGGGhhhHHhhhGGGHHHHHHHHHHHH!"

name: Riruru
message: "Wake up..."

name: Takuji
message: "Mm... This is..."

name: Takuji
message: "Huh?!"

name: Riruru
message: "Are you awake, Takuji-kun?"

name: Takuji
message: "Riruru-chan..."

name: Riruru
message: "The Holy Surge has been perfectly tuned."

name: Takuji
message: "Holy Surge?"

name: Riruru
message: "Yeah, the hotline that connects the two of us."

name: Riruru
message: "Any time you think you want to talk to me, I'll be summoned."

name: Takuji
message: "I see. So..."

name: Riruru
message: "Was there something you wanted to talk to me about?"

name: Riruru
message: "Hmm?"

name: Riruru
message: "What's wrong?

name: Takuji
message: "Oh, n-nothing."
It was kind of hard to talk to Riruru-chan about Otonashi-san.
Or rather, I didn't want to talk about her.

name: Takuji
message: "Oh, right. Today... I saw the End Sky."

name: Riruru
message: "I know that. After all, I'm―"

name: Riruru
message: "The Mahou Shoujo Riruru."

name: Takuji
message: "...I guess so."

name: Takuji
message: "You know everything, huh?"

name: Riruru
message: "Yeah."

name: Riruru
message: "How many millions of years of knowledge did you gather today?"

name: Takuji
message: "W-Well, I haven't reached the peak of existence yet."

name: Takuji
message: "But the day hasn't ended."

name: Riruru
message: "That's right."
I wonder why she doesn't say anything about Otonashi-san. She should know I talked to her.
Why...

name: Takuji
message: "Um, Riruru-chan."

name: Riruru
message: "Oh, understood. Understood, understood. I'll explain it for you!"

name: Takuji
message: "Eh, what?"

name: Riruru
message: "About Otonashi Ayana."

name: Takuji
message: "Oh, yeah."
I kind of want to hear... and don't want to hear at the same time.
Why am I afraid of her?
Why am I afraid?

name: Riruru
message: "Is she scary?"

name: Takuji
message: "...Yeah."

name: Riruru
message: "That's because..."

name: Takuji
message: "Because?"

name: Riruru
message: "Because she's not human."

name: Takuji
message: "Not human... Then what is she?"

name: Riruru
message: "Hmm, how should I put it... She's..."

name: Riruru
message: "My dregs."

name: Takuji
message: "Dregs?"

name: Riruru
message: "Kind of like sediment."

name: Takuji
message: "Sediment?"

name: Riruru
message: "It's like when stuff builds up in your sink drain."

name: Riruru
message: "You can think of her as something like that."

name: Riruru
message: "She's nothing, so―"

name: Riruru
message: "Don't worry―"

name: Riruru
message: "She's harmless―"

name: Riruru
message: "Really―?"

name: Riruru
message: "Yeah―"

name: Riruru
message: "She's not scary―"

name: Riruru
message: "I-I see―"

name: Riruru
message: "That's right, of course she's not―"

name: Riruru
message: "Maybe so, but... she makes me feel a little anxious―"

name: Riruru
message: "Like I said, believe in me―"

name: Riruru
message: "Yeah, that's right. If you say so, I'll believe you―"

name: Riruru
message: "Thank you, Takuji-kun. I love you―"

name: Riruru
message: "Oh, ehehe... That's kind of embarrassing―"

name: Riruru
message: "Why's that? You're mean―"

name: Riruru
message: "No, that's not what I mean. Thank you, Riruru-chan―"

name: Riruru
message: "Yeah. From now on, you should believe what I say―"

name: Riruru
message: "Of course―"

name: Riruru
message: "If you believe what I say, you won't have to worry about anything―"

name: Riruru
message: "Yeah!"

name: Riruru
message: "Ehe! Right, Takuji-kun?"

name: Takuji
message: "Eh?"

name: Riruru
message: "Come on, no worries, no worries."

name: Takuji
message: "Oh, uh, yeah. No worries..."
I really was convinced of it, just now.
It almost felt like I was forcibly convinced, actually.
